chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 463 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 07.12.2023 Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Najaf Ali Janwri, Clerk of Municipal Committee, Khairpur has appeared on behalf of Chief Municipal Officer, Municipal Committee, Khairpur and has filed compliance report along with a final cheque bearing No.41600928 dated 10.11.2023 of Rs.99,013/- (Rupees ninety nine thousand and thirteen), and submits that all outstanding amount in respect of pensionary benefits of the petitioner have been cleared off, which has been confirmed by learned Counsel for the petitioner. The original cheque is retained with direction to Accountant of this Court to hand over the same to the petitioner after proper identification and verification. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
